text: MR education services GmbH | Otto-Brenner-Straße 186 | 33604 Bielefeld | +49 (0)521 770122-0 | info@mr-education.de INFORMATION ABOUT YOUR LANGUAGE TRAINING Dear Mr Eicke, we are happy to conﬁrm the starting date of your English course with MRE. DETAILS: Course number 56313 Course name Harting Electric Stiftung | Englisch | Online-Gruppe EN2025 | 30 x 90 | Mo. 13:00 | Mila Sokolova Start date 12 Jan 2026 Scope of course 30 teaching units at 90 minutes Number of lessons 30 x 90 minutes. Location MS Teams Trainer Liudmyla (Mila) Sokolova Students Maik Böhme Markus Riechmann Sebastian Eicke Melanie Agethen CANCELLATION POLICY: CLICK HERE Please conﬁrm your participation by accepting the calendar appointment and, if the need to cancel should later arise, please also cancel your participation via the appointment within the cancellation period. Alternatively, you can also cancel by sending an email to info@mr- education.de We wish you a lot of fun and success with your language course. Should you have any questions or need support, do not hesitate to contact us. Bielefeld, 5 December 2025 Lisa Libke lisa.libke@mr-education.de Telefon: +49 (0)521 770122 23
